decisions.rationale: Subagents use built-in types; .claude/agents/ reserved for team teammates
Pass memory ID; agent fetches details at runtime via memory.show()
Memory must be initialized for /team workflows; no conditional branches
Role + cycle only; everything else from task description or memory
Strip agent table/compositions/examples; bridge handles task generation
Domain expertise loaded via skills frontmatter, not full agent definitions
Only agents that need independent task execution remain as teammates

decisions.decision: Trim and fill with real content
decisions.rationale: Replace placeholders; inline Karpathy principles as 4 bullet points
Eliminate always-loaded 287-line file; lazy-load domain skills

constraints: Agent files under ~40 lines (2-5K token system prompt budget)
Bridge outputs memory IDs, not full plan content
openQuestions: Should debugger use claim→close or investigate→report cycle?
How to handle /team create for review teams with skill-based agents?
Migration path for existing agent files?
